creator: rhurlin@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Palle Girgensohn from comment #3)

In fact, the ports commit ab843ea1ee69a9f541c5 seems to have fixed the problem for databases/py-pstgresql as well. I have not noticed this before. Thanks for pointing it out.


I will therefore close this PR. If there are still problems, it can be reopened.
